title: Xiaohongshu Note Booster Input
description: Input schema for generating Xiaohongshu notes. Provide a product, scene/service, or topic to generate 3 complete note drafts.

topic.description: The core subject — product name, scene/restaurant, location, or trending topic. Required. E.g., '玫瑰精华水', '上海静安寺日式烧肉店', '白色阔腿裤'.

selling_points.description: Key selling points or highlights. Each string is a distinct benefit or feature.

target_audience.description: Describe the target audience. Influences tone, emoji density, and content framing.

style.description: Writing style for the note. Determines tone and emotional appeal.

category.description: Content category for template selection and hashtag suggestions.

mood.description: Emotional tone. Affects emoji usage, punctuation, and sentence rhythm.

count.description: Number of note variants to generate (1-5).

include_disclaimer.description: Whether to include a compliance disclaimer for sensitive categories (skincare, supplements, medical).

examples.topic: 上海静安寺日式烧肉店
